chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2081 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 8230/25 2.For orders on CMA 8231/25 3.For hearing of main case 09-12-2025 M/s Abdul Naeem Pirzada and Ashfaque Ahmed Malik, Advocates for petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2&3. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition for the time being and submits that the petitioner, in the first instance, will approach the competent Medical Assessment Board, constituted under the Sindh Persons with Disabilities Protection Authority, Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Government of Sindh, for obtaining a Disability Assessment Certificate and thereafter will apply for appointment under the Disability Quota in terms of the relevant Government advertisement. Order accordingly. Instant petition along with listed application(s) stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
